biography: Dr. Rocío Gordon started her undergraduate studies in the University of Buenos Aires (Buenos Aires, Argentina) and finished in 2006 at the Hebrew University of Jerusalem (Jerusalem, Israel) where she also completed her M.A. in 2007 in the Department of Spanish and Latin American Studies. Dr. Gordon finished her Ph.D. in 2013 in the Department of Spanish and Portuguese at the University of Maryland, College Park. She focuses on Contemporary Latin American film and literature, especially from Argentina. She has presented her work in several local and international conferences and has published articles on both film and literature. Her book Narrativas de la suspensión (Narratives of suspension) was published in 2017. Her most recent research focuses on third generation Jewish-Argentinean filmmakers and on the representation of the slums in current Argentinean cinema. Dr. Gordon taught Spanish language and Latin American culture classes at the University of Maryland, College Park (2007-2013) and at Lafayette College (2012-2013). She also was a faculty member in Middlebury Languages Schools three summers (2011, 2012 and 2015). At Christopher Newport University she teaches Spanish language and culture classes (especially Spanish in the Digital Age and Conversation via Cinema), upper level Latin American literature and culture classes, the Modern Languages Senior Seminar and International Cinema.
education_entries: Ph D in Spanish, University of Maryland, College Park
MA in Spanish and Latin American Studies, Hebrew University of Jerusalem (Israel)
BA in Spanish and Latin American Literature, Hebrew University of Jerusalem (Israel)
research_interests: Contemporary Latin American Literatures and Cultures, Latin American Cinema, Literary and Film Theory, Avant-Garde.
teaching_interests: Spanish Language, Latin American Culture, and Film Studies.
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2025). “El potencial narrativo del espacio costero” . En la otra isla. Revista de audiovisual Latinoamericano. Volume, 11. Issue, 2024. Pages, 42-61.
Book, Chapter in Scholarly Book-New (2024). “Vacation Landscape and Interpersonal Crisis in Argentine Film” . Rowman and Littlefield / Lexington Books.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2024). “Felices vacaciones: cuestiones de géneros en All Inclusive, Las Vegas y Sueño Florianópolis” . Imagofagia. Volume, 29. Pages, 46-71.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2023). Los paisajes del duelo: espacios de pérdida en la costa argentina . Etica y cine. Volume, 13. Issue, 2. Pages, 37-48.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2021). “Aproximaciones a lo judío en el documental argentino reciente: Papirosen (2011), Un pogrom en Buenos Aires (2007) y Hacer patria (2006), has been accepted for publication in an edited volume “New perspectives on Latin American Documentary Film” . Revista Iberoamericana - University of Pittsburgh. Volume, 87. Issue, 277. Pages, 1179-1198.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2018). "The Villero Cinema of César González" . Studies in Spanish and Latin American Cinemas.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2018). "La villa en el cine argentino: entre el mainstream, la distancia irónica y la apropiación" . Chasqui - Revista de Literatura Latinoamericana.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2018). "El melodrama en comedias judías argentinas: El abrazo partido, Judíos en el espacio y Cara de queso" . El ojo que piensa (Journal of the University of Guadalajara). Volume, 17.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2018). “Configuraciones del ‘yo’ en El abrazo partido (2004) de Daniel Burman y Papirosen (2011) de Gastón Solnicki: entre los otros y un lugar en la historia” . Revista de Estudios Hispanicos - Washington University. Volume, 52.
Book, Scholarly-New (2017). Narrativas de la suspensión . Libraria Ediciones.

Presentations: Rocio Gordon, III Simposio de la Sección de Estudios del Cono Sur (Latin American Studies Association), "“Movilidad y detención en el cine villero argentino”," Buenos Aires, Argentina. (2019)
Rocio Gordon, Department of Spanish, Italian, and Portuguese at the University of Virginia, "“Representations of the Slums in Argentine Cinema”," Charlottesville, VA. (2018)
Rocio Gordon, Northeast Modern Language Association, "“El uso del espacio en las representaciones de la villa en el cine argentino contemporáneo”," Pittsburg, Pennsylvania. (2018)
Rocio Gordon, "“The cine villero of Cesar Gonzalez”," West Chester, Pennsylvania. (2018)

Rocio Gordon, Congreso internacional: Imaginarios digitales del sur. Historias de pertenencia y desarraigo en los cines hispánicos, "“La re-apropiación del espacio: el cine villero de César González”," Madrid, Spain. (2017)
Rocio Gordon, Latin American Studies Association Annual Conference, "“El cine en la villa y la villa en el cine”," New York, NY. (2016)

Rocio Gordon, Symposium “New perspectives on Latin American Documentary Film”, "“Aproximaciones a lo judío en el documental argentino reciente: Papirosen (2011), Un pogrom en Buenos Aires (2007) y Hacer pa," Pittsburgh, PA. (2016)

Rocio Gordon, Kentucky Foreign Language Conference, "o “Subjetividad y desencanto: configuraciones del “yo” en El abrazo partido (2004) de Daniel Burman y Papirosen (2011) de Gas," Lexington, Kentucky. (2015)

Rocio Gordon, Rocio Gordon, XIV Congreso Internacional de Literatura Hispánica, "“Narrar la derrota: El espíritu de mis padres sigue subiendo en la lluvia de Patricio Pron”," Cordoba, Argentina. (2014)
Rocio Gordon, Latin American Studies Association, International Conference, "“Detenerse En la pausa, abrir la escritura. Estética y ética en Diego Meret”," Chicago, IL. (2014)
